title: Hybrid Human-AI Systems and Shared Qualia

bci_depth.description: Brain-computer interfaces: EML-2 measurement bridge between EML-inf brain and EML-3 AI
bci_depth.reason: BCI is EML-2: voltage/spike measurement interface; does not share qualia, shares signals
